message:
fix(websocket): reset decoder/assembler state on payload-too-large errors

MessageAssembler now clears partial state when a continuation frame
exceeds max_message_size, preventing corrupt follow-up continuations.
FrameCodec resets DecodeState to Header after consuming length bytes
for an oversized payload, so the decoder does not stall in an
inconsistent state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
